chunks.title: Introduction and Praise
chunks.reason: David introduces the song and declares Yahweh as his refuge and deliverer.

chunks.title: Deliverance from Enemies
chunks.reason: David describes the distress of enemies surrounding him and Yahweh's dramatic intervention to save him.

chunks.title: Righteousness and Recompense
chunks.reason: David argues that his deliverance is based on his righteousness and Yahweh's character.

chunks.title: Victory and Dominion
chunks.reason: David recounts how God empowered him to defeat enemies and rule over nations.

chunks.title: Final Praise and Promise
chunks.reason: David concludes with a doxology and a declaration of God's eternal covenant with his line.
